---
title: "duckknit Rmd test"
output: md_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(duckknit)
```

## Basic query

```{duckdb}
SELECT 1 as val;
```

## Create and query

```{duckdb, session="persist"}
CREATE TABLE students (id INT, name TEXT, grade DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO students VALUES (1, 'Alice', 95.5), (2, 'Bob', 87.3), (3, 'Carol', 92.1);
```

```{duckdb}
SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY grade DESC;
```

## Mode chunk option

```{duckdb, mode="csv"}
SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY id;
```

## Inline mode change persists

```{duckdb}
.mode markdown
SELECT name, grade FROM students WHERE grade > 90;
```

```{duckdb}
SELECT name FROM students WHERE grade < 90;
```

## Eval false

```{duckdb, eval=FALSE}
SELECT 'not evaluated';
```

## Error display

```{duckdb, error=TRUE}
SELCT bad syntax;
```
